user.title: Monitoring Scope
user.description: Choose which batteries should be monitored.

data_description.scope: Monitor all batteries, select by device, or select individual entities.

exclude_entities.title: Exclude Entities
exclude_entities.description: Select battery entities that should **not** be monitored. Leave empty to monitor all.

select_devices.title: Select Devices
select_devices.description: Select the devices whose batteries should be monitored.

select_entities.title: Select Entities
select_entities.description: Select the battery entities to monitor. All are pre-selected by default.

thresholds.title: Configure Thresholds
thresholds.description: Define when a notification should be sent.

data_description.low_battery_threshold: Send a warning (⚠️) when the battery level falls below this value.
data_description.critical_threshold: Send a critical alert (🚨) when the battery level falls below this value. Must be lower than the warning threshold.
data_description.drop_threshold: Send a notification when the battery level drops by at least this amount.
data_description.drop_timeframe: Time window in hours over which the battery drop is measured.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose which notification channels to use.

data.enable_time_window: Only send notifications within a specific time window
data.enable_reminder: Send reminder if battery is still below threshold

data_description.reminder_interval: How many hours to wait between reminders.
data_description.enable_weekly_report: Sends a weekly summary of all monitored batteries once per week.
data_description.weekly_report_time: Time of day at which the weekly report is sent.

error.no_selection: Please select at least one entry.

abort.already_configured: Battery Status Manager is already configured.
abort.no_battery_entities: No battery entities were found in Home Assistant.
abort.no_battery_devices: No devices with battery entities were found.
abort.no_notification_services: No notification services found. Please set up a notification service (e.g. notify) first.
